step_by_step_thinking: Dysarthrosis due to condylar fracture typically indicates a disruption involving both the anatomical structure and functionality of the affected area. Therefore, option B "Disturbance of both anatomy as well as function" best describes the situation where there's a condylar fracture leading to dysarthrosis.
